problems.title: Hello, World!
problems.description:
Welcome to Scotch College Informatics Club.

This problem is to get you familiar with our custom judge.
Print `Hello, World!` in this format to output. Good luck!

problems.title: Largest Number
problems.description:
Find the maximum element inside an array.

You are given an array of integers $A_1, A_2, A_3, \cdots A_N$.
Find the maximum value amongst all the elements in the array.

**Input Format**:

The first line contains an integer $N$.
Lines 2 - ($N+1$) each contain an element in the array.

**Output Format:**

Print one integer, the maximum value in the array.

problems.title: Adding Three Numbers
problems.description:
Print the sum of the three numbers provided.

**Input Format:**

The first line contains three integers `a`, `b`, `c` on a single line.

**Output Format:**

Print one integer, the sum of the three numbers.

**Constraints:**

$1 \leq a, b, c \leq 10^5$
